vocab.prompting: Describe UI in design terms. Lovable excels at React + Tailwind + shadcn/ui interfaces.
vocab.backend: Connect Supabase for auth, database, and storage. Describe tables in plain English — Lovable creates the schema.
vocab.iteration: Select elements visually in the preview and describe changes inline. 'Make this card full-width' is more effective than editing code.
vocab.workflow: Chat to build → live preview → push to GitHub → Supabase for backend. Sync project to keep code editable locally.
vocab.components: Lovable uses shadcn/ui components. Reference them by name: 'add a Dialog here' or 'use a DataTable for this list'.
